name: dont-deal
description: Developer fatigue sensing and chest-pain triage scaffolding for local AI coding hosts.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/git-sleep.js && node --check src/host-detect.js && node --check src/system-info.js && node --check src/config-store.js && node --check src/profile-store.js && node --check src/triage-engine.js && node --check src/quick-triage-cli.js && npm --prefix skills/dont-deal-triage run check
